title: Delicate Sour Italian Pasta
description: A light and sour Sicilian dish featuring pomegranate molasses, this pasta is a show-off for any occasion, finished to a perfect al-dente texture and shojin-friendly for all to enjoy.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the spaghetti according to package instructions until al-dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the minced garlic, cooking for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the halved cherry tomatoes to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes until they start to release their juices.
Stir in the pomegranate molasses, salt, and black pepper, and cook for an additional minute.
Reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining the spaghetti, then add the spaghetti to the skillet with the tomato mixture.
Toss the spaghetti in the skillet, adding some reserved pasta water if the mixture seems too dry.
Stir in the chopped fresh basil and lemon juice, and cook for a final minute.
Serve the pasta hot, garnished with additional basil if desired.
